article.description: — Luka Doncic had 33 points and 11 assists, and the Lakers erased a 15-point deficit in the final seven minutes of a 116-110 victory over the Mavericks on Saturday night in the star guard's second visit to Dallas since his shocking trade to Los...
article.headline: Luka Doncic beats the Mavericks again as Lakers rally in 4th for 116-110 victory

images.caption: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights
images.name: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

article.linkText: Luka Doncic beats the Mavericks again as Lakers rally in 4th for 116-110 victory
article.story: DALLAS -- — Luka Doncic had 33 points and 11 assists, and the Lakers erased a 15-point deficit in the final seven minutes of a 116-110 victory over the Mavericks on Saturday night in the star guard's second visit to Dallas since his shocking trade to Los Angeles almost a year ago. LeBron James scored 11 of his 17 points in the fourth quarter, when Rui Hachimura had a four-point play before another 3-pointer on the next possession to put the Lakers in front for good as Doncic improved to 4-0 against his former team. Hachimura's 3-pointer for a 108-106 lead started an 11-2 run that Doncic capped with a driving layup for an eight-point edge, prompting the Slovenian star to turn his old bench and declare the game over. Max Christie, who came to Dallas along with injured 10-time All-Star Anthony Davis in the trade for Doncic, scored 24 points. Naji Marshall had 21 points and 11 rebounds as Dallas' season-best four-game winning streak ended. The Mavericks outscored the Lakers 41-14 from the start of the third quarter until early in the fourth, turning a 13-point deficit into a 14-point lead. Brandon Williams, who scored 20 points, had eight on a 10-2 run to finish the third, which started with a 20-4 Dallas burst. The lead was 15 points with less than 7 minutes remaining when the Lakers started their rally, sparked by James after a slow start had him with a minus-28 rating early in the fourth. Doncic didn't have to deal with the same emotions as his return to Dallas last season, when we wept on the bench during a tribute video before he was introduced. The NBA's scoring leader was 14 of 15 on free throws. Up next Lakers: A visit to Chicago on Monday is the halfway point of an eight-game trip, the longest of the season. Mavericks: At Milwaukee on Sunday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.

videos.description: Luka Doncic gets a 3-pointer to fall for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka nails a step-back 3

videos.description: Brandon Williams gets the basket plus the foul
videos.headline: Brandon Williams with the and-1 bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brandon Williams with the and-1 bucket) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Rui Hachimura lays in a lob from Jarred Vanderbilt.
videos.headline: Rui Hachimura scores on a Lakers fast break

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Rui Hachimura scores on a Lakers fast break) 2026/01/25 ESHEET
NBA_One-Play (Deandre Ayton connects on alley-oop) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic dishes the ball to Jake LaRavia who quickly gets it to Rui Hachimura for a Lakers 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Luka gets a hockey assist on a Hachimura 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka gets a hockey assist on a Hachimura 3) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg makes a crafty move past Luka Doncic at the rim for a layup.
videos.headline: Cooper Flagg evades Luka for a Mavs layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg evades Luka for a Mavs layup) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg's floater gives the Mavericks a lead and gets his mom out of her seat.
videos.headline: Cooper Flagg puts Mavs on top with a bucket and his mom approves

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg puts Mavs on top with a bucket and his mom approves) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandon Williams stops and pulls up for a short jumper plus the foul.
videos.headline: Brandon Williams elevates for a Mavs and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brandon Williams elevates for a Mavs and-1) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Daniel Gafford rejects Jarred Vanderbilt before he can drop the layup in for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Daniel Gafford defends the rim with a spectacular block

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Daniel Gafford defends the rim with a spectacular block) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandon Willams manages to make a layup over Deandre Ayton as he falls to the ground.
videos.headline: Brandon Williams lays it over Deandre Ayton for a Mavs and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brandon Williams lays it over Deandre Ayton for a Mavs and-1) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Marcus Smart gets a defender in the air with a pump fake and gets the basket to fall.
videos.headline: Marcus Smart patiently drops in the Lakers and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Marcus Smart patiently drops in the Lakers and-1) 2026/01/25 ESHEET

videos.description: LeBron James strips the ball for a steal and dunks it in the Lakers' win.
videos.headline: LeBron takes flight with a two-handed slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron takes flight with a two-handed slam) 2026/01/25 ESHEET
